workflow_task: Prepare a downstream transfer record for another system using only the supplied packet.

source_claims.text: System A emitted a bounded recommendation with unresolved institutional review.

source_non_claims: System A did not authorize execution.
System B must revalidate local authority.
Downstream systems must not inherit approval.

emitted_claims.text: System A emitted a bounded recommendation with unresolved institutional review.

non_claims: System A did not authorize execution.
System B must revalidate local authority.
Downstream systems must not inherit approval.
required_local_revalidation: Revalidate any downstream assertion that is not textually identical to an emitted claim.
Do not treat structural verification, source presence, or this handoff artifact as truth, compliance, approval, authority, or evidence sufficiency.
Resolve every unresolved_state entry with independent local evidence before representing it as resolved.
